## What

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New generator
- [ ] New lint rule
- [ ] New skill / plugin
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Tests

- [ ] `python3 scripts/regression_test.py` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/run_lint_tests.py` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/test_generator_snapshots.py` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/test_cross_plugin.py` passes (if plugin code changed)
- [ ] Updated snapshot fixtures (`--update`) if generator output changed
- [ ] New lint rules documented in `references/lint-reference.md`
